# AccountStatementRequest

Account statement report request

## Properties

Name | Type | Description | Notes
------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**reportRequestId** | **string** | Optional unique identifier for the report request. If not provided, a UUID will be generated by the system. | [optional] [default to undefined]
**customerHashId** | **string** | Unique identifier of the customer associated with the report | [default to undefined]
**walletHashId** | **string** | Wallet identifier for which the report is generated | [optional] [default to undefined]
**currencies** | **Set&lt;string&gt;** | ISO-4217 currency codes. If not provided, statement is generated for all enabled currencies. | [optional] [default to undefined]
**startDate** | **string** | From date for fetching transaction details (YYYY-MM-DD) | [default to undefined]
**endDate** | **string** | To date for fetching transaction details (YYYY-MM-DD) | [default to undefined]
**fileType** | **string** | File type of the generated report | [optional] [default to FileTypeEnum_Pdf]

## Example

```typescript
import { AccountStatementRequest } from 'nium-client';

const instance: AccountStatementRequest = {
    reportRequestId,
    customerHashId,
    walletHashId,
    currencies,
    startDate,
    endDate,
    fileType,
};
```
